untranslatable_reason: Signal requires (1) detection of 'significant decline >1% from recent high' and 'rally begins' — requires multi-bar pattern recognition and relative high tracking not available in allowed indicators; (2) Advance/Decline line comparison to 'prior rally high' — advance/decline line itself is not in allowed indicators; (3) Partial exit logic (25-33% position sizing) cannot be expressed in rule conditions; (4) 'Confirmation of second signal' requires state tracking across multiple conditions. Mapped closest available: vol_ratio_20 for volume weakness, price_pos_20 as proxy for breadth participation, but core advance/decline and pattern detection cannot be implemented.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a market internals divergence pattern that requires advance/decline line indicator and multi-bar decline/rally pattern detection. The entry condition (identifying decline + rally start) and the confirmation logic (second signal triggers full exit) both require capabilities outside the allowed indicator set. vol_ratio_20 approximates volume weakness at 60th percentile threshold (0.60 ratio), and price_pos_20 < 0.55 approximates the <55% advancing stocks threshold, but these are insufficient proxies for the intended logic. Recommend adding ADV/DECL line indicator and pattern recognition capabilities for proper implementation.
